Container.Name: BackIssue
Container.Overview: BackIssue is a self-hosted comic library manager. Track the comic series you want, download new issues automatically as they release, tag them with metadata, and keep everything organized on disk. ComicVine is the source of truth for every comic's identity; download sources (Usenet, torrents, and more) are added as plugins from an in-app catalog. On first run it walks you through creating an admin account and picking plugins. Unraid setup: map your comics library to the container (default /comics), then in BackIssue open Settings > Library and add /comics as a root folder.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the BackIssue web interface.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Database, settings, and app state. Keep this on appdata.

Config.Name: Comics Library
Config.Description: Your comics library on disk. In BackIssue: Settings > Library, add /comics as a root folder.

Config.Name: Downloads (optional)
Config.Description: Only needed if a separate download client (SABnzbd/qBittorrent) writes completed files that BackIssue must read at the same path. Leave unset otherwise.

Config.Name: Trust Proxy
Config.Description: Set to 1 (or your proxy subnet) when running behind a reverse proxy, so real client IPs and Secure cookies work. Leave blank for a direct connection.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID the app runs as — files it writes to your shares are owned by this user. Unraid default is 99 (nobody).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID the app runs as. Unraid default is 100 (users).

Config.Name: UMASK
Config.Description: Permission mask for new files (022 = files 644, dirs 755).
